seo.title: KSeF Hub — Open-source invoice ledger for Poland's KSeF
seo.description: Open-source, self-hostable invoice ledger for Poland's KSeF (Krajowy System e-Faktur). Automatic sync, OCR for PDF invoices, ML categorization, REST API. Self-host or managed.

blog.heading: What's new in KSeF Hub.
blog.subhead: Release notes, technical deep-dives, and updates on Poland's KSeF rollout.
blog.emptyState: Blog posts in English are coming soon.

hero.subhead: Pulls from Poland's KSeF on a schedule, accepts PDFs by inbound email, categorizes with ML, flags duplicates, and hands clean data to your accountant — or to your next dashboard via API. Ship it yourself or let us run it.

data.title: Your data, your server
data.body: Self-host the whole thing. No telemetry, no lock-in.

multi.title: Multi-company by default
multi.body: One install, every NIP. Switch context from the nav.

audit.title: Full audit log
audit.body: Every sync, approve, reject, export — timestamped, immutable.

sync.title: Hands-free sync
sync.body: Cron-driven pulls from KSeF. No manual logins.

why.heading: The KSeF portal wasn't built for the people using it.
why.para1: As of 2026, every Polish company has to pull invoices from Krajowy System e-Faktur (KSeF), reconcile them with the PDFs that still arrive by email, and hand the whole mess to their accountant. Doing that by hand through the government portal is a daily tax on your time.
why.para2: KSeF Hub is the missing operating layer: a proper UI, a REST API, ML that learns your categories, and permissioned access for the people who help you run the business. It's open source so you can audit it, fork it, or run it yourself — and managed if you'd rather not.

featuresSection.heading: Everything you were doing by hand, automated.
featuresSection.subhead: From ingest to export. Each piece works independently; together they replace the spreadsheet-plus-email workflow most companies run today.

ksefSync.title: Periodic KSeF sync
ksefSync.body: Scheduled pulls from the government e-invoice system. Certificate stays on your server; no browser logins, no stale sessions.

multiCompany.title: Every company in one place
multiCompany.body: Add as many NIPs as you like. The admin switches context in one click — no separate logins per entity.

email.title: PDFs, OCR, inbound email
email.body: Forward an expense to your company inbox. We extract NIP, amounts, dates with OCR and drop it into the same ledger as KSeF rows.

ml.title: ML categories, per company
ml.body: Models train on your company's corrections, not a global dataset. Predictions at ≥80% confidence auto-apply; anything lower arrives flagged for review. Never predicts a category you haven't configured.

corrections.title: Correction invoices, linked
corrections.body: KSeF issues corrections (faktura korygująca) as separate documents. Each is modeled with a link to the original, a reason, and the affected period — one timeline, not two unrelated rows.

approval.title: Approval with trust tiers
approval.body: KSeF invoices stay pending until a human signs off. Team uploads with complete extraction can auto-approve on arrival — opt-in per company. Every row is pending, approved, rejected, or excluded (kept for audit, off the books).

payments.title: Bank-ready payment transfers
payments.body: Export Polish bank-transfer CSVs (rachunek_zleceniodawcy) from approved expenses. Multi-currency, per-company bank accounts, bulk select across vendors. Mark paid in bulk; the ledger updates atomically.

certificate.title: KSeF certificate management
certificate.body: Upload once, expiry tracked, renewal reminders. Stored encrypted on your server, never in a third-party cloud.

accountant.title: Accountant access
accountant.body: Scoped read + export. Your accountant pulls monthly packages directly; no more zipped email attachments.

perInvoice.title: Per-invoice permissions
perInvoice.body: Share a single row with a stakeholder without exposing the rest. Approver, editor, viewer — revoke in one click.

activity.title: Activity log, end-to-end
activity.body: Who synced, who approved, who exported, who changed the category. Every action is timestamped and attributable.

api.title: REST API, webhooks
api.body: Every row has an endpoint. Pipe into your BI stack, trigger your own workflows on new approvals, or build a custom UI on top.

ledger.heading: Unified row, whatever the source.
ledger.body: KSeF rows, emailed PDFs, and manual foreign invoices all land in the same table with the same fields. Sources are marked with a single-character dot so you can spot outliers without a legend lookup.
bullets: Amount gross-on-top, net-below — the real reading order for accountants
Multi-select: bulk approve, reject, export, mark paid
Date range + Status + Category + Tag filters, combinable

api.heading: A REST API for KSeF — every invoice as an endpoint.
api.body: Read invoices, trigger syncs, mark payments, subscribe to events. Everything the admin UI does is available over HTTP.
api.codeComment1: # Fetch this month's approved expenses for one NIP

apiDocs.seoDescription: Interactive REST API reference for KSeF Hub. Every endpoint, schema, and response shape, generated from the live OpenAPI spec.

os.heading: Audit it. Fork it. Run it.
os.body: KSeF Hub is licensed AGPL-3.0. Read every line, check every migration, run it in your own datacenter. If you improve it, upstream the patch — or fork it and ship your own flavour.

license.label: License
license.body: Copyleft. Use it, host it for yourself — if you offer it as a service, your modifications go back to the community.

stack.label: Stack
stack.body: A BEAM server. Handles thousands of syncs concurrently on a single small VM. Boring tech, long runway.

selfHost.label: Self-host
selfHost.body: One .env, one container per service. Postgres, Oban, the Phoenix app, an OCR worker. Bring your own reverse proxy.

community.label: Community
community.body: Issues, RFCs, and a weekly open call. Built by founders who'd rather not touch the government portal ever again.

pricing.heading: Run it yourself, or hand it to us.
pricing.body: Same code, same features. Pick how much you want to operate.

enterprise.label: Enterprise
features: We host, monitor, back up, upgrade

faq.heading: Questions people ask before they install.

items.a: KSeF (Krajowy System e-Faktur) is Poland's national e-invoice system. From 2026 every registered company must issue and receive invoices through KSeF. KSeF Hub sits on top of it and handles the integration, so your team doesn't have to touch the government portal.

Yes. KSeF Hub is AGPL-3.0 licensed and ships as a docker-compose stack: Postgres, the Phoenix app, and a couple of sidecars. Bring your own reverse proxy and you're live in under an hour. There's also a managed version if you'd rather not operate it yourself.

items.q: Which KSeF certificates does KSeF Hub support?
items.a: Person certificates (tied to PESEL) and company (NIP) certificates. Certificates are user-scoped, so one uploaded cert authenticates KSeF sessions for every company the user has access to. Certificates stay encrypted at rest on your server — never in a third-party cloud.

items.q: Does it handle correction invoices (faktura korygująca)?
items.a: Yes. KSeF Hub models the full KSeF invoice taxonomy: standard, corrections, advances, simplified, and settlements. Correction invoices are linked to their originals with a reason and the affected period — one timeline, not two unrelated rows.

Models train on your company's corrections, not a global dataset. Predictions at ≥80% confidence auto-apply; anything lower arrives flagged for review. The model never predicts a category that isn't already on your list.

Yes. Every row in the ledger is exposed over HTTP. Endpoints for reading invoices, triggering syncs, approving payments, and webhooks for invoice.created, invoice.approved, and sync.failed. Bearer-token auth.

closing.heading: Stop forwarding PDFs. Run one ledger.
closing.body: Clone the repo, spin up a container, point it at your KSeF certificate. Your ledger is live in under an hour.

footer.tagline: Open-source ledger for Polish companies. AGPL-3.0.
footer.copyright: © 2026 KSeF Hub contributors. Built in Poland.
